floor_history.headline: Recon: HUD frame/gauge draw fn — 11 func_8007352C calls through a reused stack param-block, 8 small tile loops, mode if/else ladder; plain C, full m2c reference

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED (flagship): settle the func_8007352C call ABI (many-arg call with stack-homed args 5+ at sp+0x18.. vs pointer-to-stack-struct) by reading func_8007352C's prologue, then a full-body draft reproduces the 11-call sequence and collapses 752 to tile-loop/RA residual
frontier.mechanism: if func_8007352C reads its 5th+ args from the caller frame (lw from sp+0x10/0x14/0x18... in ITS prologue relative to caller sp), the C is a plain >4-arg prototype and GCC homes exactly the observed sp+0x18..0x34 slots; if it loads through a0, it's a struct pointer. The repeated partial rewrites between calls then fall out naturally (args re-passed vs fields re-stored)
frontier.next_probe: read asm/funcs/func_8007352C.s first 30 insns (or its src if partially decompiled); count its formal args; then draft func_8005C8A8's first two calls only and sandbox to verify the arg-homing byte pattern before writing the remaining 9

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED: mode 0 is a LABEL inside mode 2's flow (block_20) — the original used `if (mode == 2) { ...; } /* falls into */ mode0_body;` reached by goto/fallthrough from the mode ladder (if (mode==0) goto block_20 from the top) — reproducing the exact if/else ladder shape (mode!=1 -> mode<2 -> mode!=0 nest) is required for the 4 long forward branches at 0x8005C948-0x8005C974
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 lays out nested if/else by source order; the observed branch topology (beq mode,2 forward; beqz mode into the shared body; j around the mode-1 arm) pins the source ladder shape — a switch or reordered ladder produces different branch senses (switch-vs-ifchain-branch-sense family)
frontier.next_probe: draft the ladder exactly as m2c shows (if (mode != 1) { if (mode < 2) { if (mode != 0) {...} else goto shared; } else { mode2 body... shared: ... } } else { mode1 }) and check the 0x8005C948/0x8005C95C/0x8005C964/0x8005C974 branch quartet in the sandbox diff

frontier.hypothesis: UNMEASURED: the 5 near-identical 2-iter border-tile loop bodies are 5 separate inline do-while loops in source (not a helper): each writes rgb triple via THREE s8 stores, and the /2 centering math switches spelling between signed `/2` (early loops, div-free sra sign-fix on s16-sourced values) and u32-cast `(x + (x>>31)) >> 1` (loop_43/51) — the spelling difference is source-level (s32 vs u32 intermediate), not allocator noise
frontier.mechanism: GCC emits sra+addu sign-fix for s32 x/2 but a bare srl when the source expression is (u32)(x + (x>>31)) >> 1; m2c faithfully shows both spellings in different loops, so the original mixed them — copying one spelling everywhere will leave ~2-insn diffs per loop instance
frontier.next_probe: draft loops with the per-instance spelling from the m2c reference; if a loop still diverges by a srl/sra pair, flip that instance's intermediate type and re-sandbox (cheap A/B, 5 sites)
